children.name: Drymonema
children.description: Drymonema — a genus of drymonematid jellyfish in the family Drymonematidae.

children.name: Drymonema dalmatinum
children.description: Drymonema dalmatinum is a species of scyphozoan jellyfish also known as the dalmatian mane jelly, the cauliflower jellyfish, or, in the United States, the pink meanie.

children.name: Drymonema gorgo
children.description: Drymonema gorgo is a species of jellyfish in the class Scyphozoa.

children.name: Drymonema larsoni
children.description: Drymonema larsoni, known as the pink meanie, is a species of jellyfish belonging to the class Scyphozoa (true jellyfish).
